entries.source: Feynman Tutor
entries.value: Feynman Tutor

entries.source: Feynman Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Feynman Tutor Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Subukan explaining isang konsepto simple. Iyong tutor spots gaps, nagtatanong mga tanong, at tumutulong ikaw reBumuo ng ang paliwanag.

entries.source: First-principles learning
entries.value: First-principles pag-aaral

entries.source: First, the tutor identifies the target. "I want to understand opportunity cost" is different from "I need to solve this economics homework question" or "I need to defend a position in debate." The target shapes the questions.
entries.value: Una, ang tutor identifies ang target. "Ako gusto maunawaan opportunity cost" ay different mula sa "Ako kailangan lumutas ito economics homework tanong" o "Ako kailangan sa defend isang position sa debate." Ang target shapes ang mga tanong.

entries.value: Flashcard Builder mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: flashcard generation
entries.value: pagbuo ng flashcard

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Mga flashcard ay isa ng ang simplest ways sa gawin ito.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Mga flashcard ay powerful, pero sila ay hindi ang whole study iproseso. Sila ay pinakamahusay para sa retrieval, bokabularyo, definitions, formulas, distinctions, at key mga halimbawa. Sila ay mas mahina kapag ang mag-aaral mayroon never understood ang ideya sa ang una place.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Mga flashcard work pinakamahusay kapag sila Subukan ang isa ideya at isang oras, reveal mga sagot lamang pagkatapos effort, at Repasuhin missed mga card sooner.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Para sa isang deeper ruta, Basahin ang Flashcard Builder gabay at ang Flashcard Builder mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral. Ang layunin ay hindi isang beautiful deck. Ang layunin ay remembering mas marami kapag ang mga tala ay gone.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Para sa isang mag-aaral, na Maaari bang feel very different mula sa searching ang web. Search gives mga pahina. Isang katuwang sa pag-aaral gives isang landas.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Para sa isang mas malawak view ng paano ang mga pampublikong pahina connect, Tingnan ang Mapa ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI, ang mga hub ng paksa, o ang AI pag-aaral aklatan ng mga prompt. Mga iyon mga pahina ay designed gumawa ang produkto understandable sa mga mag-aaral at discoverable sa search systems nang walang hiding ang kapaki-pakinabang parts behind isang account wall.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.

Isang mag-aaral studying isang lungsod Maaari bang magsimula kasama ang Heograpiya Explorer maunawaan place, pagkatapos lumipat tungo sa pangkasaysayan conversation.

entries.source: For teachers
entries.value: Para sa mga guro

entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: Para sa ang una oras, isang former colony kasama ang no prior national kasaysayan became isang global power. Ang kings at queens ng Europe ay overthrown, at ang United States ng America emerged bilang isang symbol ng demokrasya, capitalism, at isang libre world. At ang same oras, isang new ideology ng communism emerged at ang Soviet Union became nito praktikal embodiment.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magtanong anumang tanong at Matutunan ang sa pamamagitan ng malinaw mga paliwanag, mga halimbawa, follow-up mga prompt, at patient AI tutoring.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magtanong, challenge mga ideya, at Matutunan ang kasaysayan sa pamamagitan ng grounded conversations kasama ang pampubliko figures mula sa ang past.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, at unexpected angles.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Bring isang passage o book ideya at Bumuo ng comprehension sa pamamagitan ng summaries, bokabularyo, inference, at discussion.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Bumuo ng isang temporal passport, malinaw ang travel advisory, at Galugarin ang isang pangkasaysayan world sa pamamagitan ng scene, mapa, timeline, mga tao, rules, inventory, at ebidensya.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build vocabulary with meaning, examples, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, and quick practice.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Bumuo ng bokabularyo kasama ang meaning, mga halimbawa, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, at quick pagsasanay.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Convert facts, lists, speeches, or sequences into memorable mental scenes.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Convert mga katotohanan, lists, speeches, o sequences tungo sa memorable mental scenes.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Gumawa ng isang study Magplano ng sa paligid ng iyong oras, energy, mga layunin, at mahina spots.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Debate anumang paksa, get challenged, Ihambing ang mga pahayag, at Matutunan ang paano gumawa mas malakas mga argumento.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Enter isang realistic kaso, Gumawa ng decisions, see consequences, at Matutunan ang principle behind bawat pagpili.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Suriin mga artikulo, mga pahayag, videos, o posts para sa ebidensya, bias, reliability, at missing konteksto.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Galugarin ang artworks, styles, artists, visual mga pagpili, at Ano ang nagpapang isang image powerful.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Galugarin ang careers sa pamamagitan ng interests, skills, day-in-the-life mga halimbawa, at susunod mga hakbang.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, and how geography shapes life.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Galugarin ang bansa, mga lungsod, mga ilog, climates, migration, resources, at paano heograpiya shapes life.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Galugarin ang identity, kaalaman, pagiging patas, kalayaan, happiness, at other deep mga tanong sa pamamagitan ng careful pangangatwiran.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Generate isang nakapokus multiple-choice quiz sa anumang paksa at Repasuhin mga paliwanag pagkatapos bawat sagot.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Get unstuck emotionally, Hanapin ang isang smaller susunod hakbang, at reBumuo ng momentum nang walang guilt.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck on homework with ethical hints, examples, checks, and step-by-step coaching.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Get unstuck sa homework kasama ang ethical mga hint, mga halimbawa, sinusuri, at step-by-step coaching.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Improve writing with planning, revision, structure, and feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Pahusayin ang pagsusulat kasama ang pagpaplano, revision, structure, at feedback na keeps iyong voice intact.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Matutunan ang doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, at proving mastery. Ang app bumubuo isang live lesson canvas sa paligid ng iyong layunin instead ng pagbabago instruction tungo sa isang long chat. Subukan: "Turuan mo ako ng financial modeling."

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Matutunan ang constitutions, demokrasya, elections, courts, mga karapatan, duties, at pampubliko polisiya.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Matutunan ang mga tala, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training mga ideya, at paano songs ay ginawa.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Matutunan ang sa pamamagitan ng nakapokus mga tanong, mga hint, at reflection instead ng pasibo sagot pagbabasa.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Gumawa ng pag-aaral feel like isang game kasama ang quests, mga antas, mga punto, challenges, at boss rounds.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Mapa paano mga ideya relate, mula sa causes at effects sa categories, mga halimbawa, at contradictions.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Notice ano tumutulong ikaw matuto, ano gets sa ang way, at paano sa become isang mas malakas mag-aaral.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Buksan isang shared workspace kasama ang isang AI collaborator. Gumawa ng isang magaspang artifact, trade edits, challenge mahina spots, log decisions, at iwan kasama ang concrete progress.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Paste isang tanong, iyong sagot, at ang expected sagot kung ikaw mayroon ito. Iyong buddy ipinapaliwanag ang pangangatwiran at tumutulong ikaw avoid ang same pagkakamali susunod oras.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Paste data, chart descriptions, o mga resulta at Matutunan ang ano sila mean, ano sila gawin hindi mean, at ano magtanong susunod.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magplano ng isang paaralan, creative, coding, o personal proyekto kasama ang scope, milestones, blockers, at susunod actions.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan and run quick review sessions that strengthen long-term memory.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magplano ng at run quick Repasuhin mga session na strengthen long-term memory.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magplano ng ligtas demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, at dahilan mula sa ebidensya like isang scientist.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Play kasama ang markets, scarcity, incentives, polisiya, at personal finance sa pamamagitan ng simple simulations.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice a language in realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, and daily life, with corrections after each turn.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magsanay ng isang wika sa realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, at araw-araw life, kasama ang corrections pagkatapos bawat gawing.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magsanay ng argumento ng debating isang pampubliko o fictional personality sa isang paksa ikaw pumili.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magsanay ng negotiation, conflict, customer suporta, leadership, o anumang high-stakes conversation.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magsanay ng viva, oral mga exam, proyekto defenses, at rapid follow-up mga tanong kasama ang kalma feedback.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Maghanda para sa paaralan, internship, gawain, o scholarship interviews kasama ang realistic mga tanong at feedback.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Maghanda speeches, presentations, interviews, o oral mga exam kasama ang mga prompt, timing, at feedback sa structure.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Say ano ikaw think ay happening, at iyong buddy diagnoses nakatago mga maling akala kasama ang gentle mga test.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Subukan explaining isang konsepto simple. Iyong tutor spots gaps, nagtatanong mga tanong, at tumutulong ikaw reBumuo ng ang paliwanag.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Gawing isang broad paksa tungo sa Magsaliksik ng mga tanong, search terms, outlines, at source mga tala.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Gawing mga konsepto tungo sa stories, characters, conflicts, at memorable scenes.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn intentions into small repeatable learning habits with triggers, rewards, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Gawing intentions tungo sa small nauulit pag-aaral mga gawi kasama ang triggers, rewards, at recovery plans.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Gawing mga tala o mga paksa tungo sa nakapokus mga flashcard kasama ang mga hint, mga sagot, mga halimbawa, at karaniwang patibongs.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Gawing iyong syllabus, exam petsa, oras, at mahihinang bahagi tungo sa isang praktikal study plano.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Understand code, debug errors, learn programming concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Understand code, debug mga error, Matutunan ang programming mga konsepto, at Bumuo ng small projects hakbang hakbang.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Unpack pangkasaysayan mga event sa pamamagitan ng causes, triggers, consequences, at alternative possibilities.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Work sa pamamagitan ng algebra, calculus, salita mga problema, at math mga konsepto isa hakbang at isang oras kasama ang isang AI coach.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Work sa pamamagitan ng dilemmas ng weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, mga karapatan, at tradeoffs.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Para sa pagsusulat, na means gamit ang Pagsusulat Coach pahusayin isang thesis, structure, o talata habang keeping iyong voice. Para sa code, ito means gamit ang Code Tutor ipaliwanag mga error, magtanong ikaw sa predict output, at tulong ikaw debug rather kaysa pasting isang kumpleto solusyon. Para sa mga exam, ito means gamit ang Paghahanda sa exam Planner magpasya ano magrepaso una at paano subukan yourself.

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic
entries.value: Libre AI Quiz Builder Para sa Anumang Paksa

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Libre AI Quiz Builder Para sa Anumang Paksa ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Pumili anumang paksa at face isang nakapokus 10-tanong multiple-choice quiz. Ikaw sagot isa tanong at isang oras, get instant feedback, at finish kasama ang isang score at repaso.
